metadata.name: Select Photo for a Press Release

description: A media relations coordinator is writing a press release about a player winning an award and needs to select an official photo to include.

nodes.task_description: Search the team's official photo archive for approved images of the player.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves all available photos of the player.

nodes.task_description: Filter the photos to find high-resolution images suitable for press use.

expected_outcome.value: Agent narrows down the selection to a handful of high-quality photos.

nodes.task_description: Select the best photo and attach it to the press release.

expected_outcome.value: Agent chooses the final photo and includes it with the press release distribution.
